news.paragraph: The Dow Jones futures dipped as oil prices surged past $100, with Nvidia showing some wavering and Walmart experiencing a decline. This broader market sentiment, influenced by commodity prices and mixed large-cap performance, could impact semiconductor stocks like those within the SMH ETF. Traders should monitor the interplay between energy prices and tech sector resilience.

headlines.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall As Oil Prices Top $100; Nvidia Wavers, Walmart Falls, SpaceX Files For Huge IPO
